title: The World's Most Used Painkiller Barely Works
description: Acetaminophen is the world's most-reached-for painkiller — and for its two most common uses, back pain and osteoarthritis, the evidence now says it performs at or near placebo. This piece investigates how clinical guidelines quietly downgraded the drug while public habit and practitioner defaults never caught up, who funded the trials that built its reputation, and what the honest case for keeping it on the shelf actually looks like.
